title: PINGEUI 6 PCS Wicker Place Mats Round, 25cm Natural Hyacinth Place Mats handmade Seagrass Rattan Woven Placemats for Restaurant, Home Kitchen Dining Table Accessories
features: PRACTICAL DESIGN - The 1 cm thickness of the Hyacinth Place Mats provides excellent insulation and prevents heat transfer to the tabletop, eliminating the need to worry about surface damage or burns caused by direct contact with hot plates or cups.

GOOD QUALITY - Our Wicker Place Mats Round are made from huckleberry, a material that is woven to provide toughness and abrasion resistance to withstand the friction and stress of daily use, as well as a unique natural aesthetic.

EASY TO CLEAN - The Rattan Woven Placemats have a smooth, easy-to-clean surface. Simply wipe the surface of the mat with a damp cloth to quickly remove food residue and dust, and then clean and dry it for reuse, keeping the mat clean and hygienic.

SPECIFICATION - A set of 6 PCS Seagrass Placemats Round, diameter of 25 cm, the size of the moderate in the placement of more convenient, they will not occupy too much space on the desktop, easy to freely place tableware and food, make the table neat and orderly.

WIDE APPLICATION - The Hyacinth Place Mats are widely used in dining tables, kitchens, bedrooms, restaurants, and can also be used for outdoor picnics, camping and other activities due to the convenience of portability, becoming perfect choice for many families and restaurants.
